meta.title: David M. Schulman / A web wonderland

about.pitch: I focus on creating clean and tidy web ecosystems architected to manage complexity and built on good design.
about.fullPitch: My name is David M. Schulman and I'm a Design Systems Engineer based in Philadelphia, PA. I focus on creating clean and tidy web ecosystems architected to manage complexity and built on good design.
